characters.core_drive: Protect daughters while understanding what happened to Mother.
Turn fear into maps, proofs, and plans.
Make sense of forest patterns through metaphor and feeling.
Protect Brindlewood routes from exploitation while preserving family record.
Keep people safe and avoid repeating past land-management mistakes.
Secure extraction access through legal and narrative shortcuts.

trust_arc: Clara doubts Father's willingness to follow complex clues.
Father validates her map logic in field decisions.
By mid-game, Clara consults Father before acting alone.
tensions: Speed of action vs evidence gathering

trust_arc: Mina fears adults will dismiss her symbolic language.
Father repeats her clues verbatim in planning scenes.
Mina offers higher-confidence hints after emotional reassurance.
Clara initially filters Mina's imagery as noise.
Shared clue-board scenes translate image into test cases.
Late game: Clara treats Mina's phrasing as early-warning data.
Father carries unresolved guilt over last argument before disappearance.
Recovered notes reveal Mother trusted him to complete stewardship plan.
Final arc resolves guilt into active responsibility.
tensions: Practical survival tasks vs long-term ecological duty

trust_arc: Clara idealizes Mother's certainty.
Field notes reveal uncertainty and revisions.
Clara accepts doubt as part of rigorous care.
tensions: Need for clear answers vs incomplete records

trust_arc: Mina feels Mother still 'talks' through woods.
Family reframes this as memory carried in places and routines.
Mina keeps wonder without being dismissed as fantasy-only.
Ivo suspects family is emotionally compromised.
Joint field tasks prove disciplined methods.
Ivo provides testimony and logistics support in final act.
tensions: Bureaucratic caution vs urgent family need

trust_arc: Voss frames extraction as jobs-and-safety compromise.
Evidence links Voss to permit manipulation and selective omission.
Conflict resolves through public accountability, not vigilante revenge.
Ivo initially gives Voss procedural benefit of the doubt.
Cache maps and permit dates expose pattern mismatches.
Ivo shifts from passive oversight to active reporting.

mechanical_effects: Higher-quality clue synthesis after shared table scenes.
Reduced hint ambiguity when both daughters are consulted before route choice.
Extra reconciliation dialogue after failed puzzles.
